name: Mike B courts
description: Come play pickleball at Mike B courts in Albany, KY! There are 2 concrete courts. 1 is outdoors and 1 is indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Mountain View Park Court
description: Mountain View Park Court is a place to play pickleball in Albany, KY. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
